meaning: n.[鍖朷 纭濆熀鐢茬兎
examples: They were able to nitrate methane to nitromethane.
Based on the experimental results , combined with thermodynamic and kinetic analysis, the exploratory study on fast reaction of nitromethane calytized by nano-nanoparticles were discussed.
The results demonstrate that nano-aluminum have positive effect on accelerating the decomposition rate of nitromethane and that the explosion efficiency of nitromethane was greatly improved.
